subject: ARIA has a question for you...
body:
Hi Vansh Mittal,While you were away, something was waiting for you.
 Not just 12,000+ gyms.
 ARIA. Your personal AI fitness coach. 
 
Here's what ARIA does that no regular gym can:
Learns you, your goals, your pace. The more you train with ARIA, the smarter she gets.

Guides your training. Detailed exercise instructions, sets, reps, rest times, and everything you need. 
Builds your plan. Dynamic workout plans tailored specifically to you.

This is the world's first smart AI fitness coach, built to help you actually get there.  




Don't restart from scratch. Pic

subject: Your UGC videos are about to level up 👀
body:
[https://pa.predis.ai/71d7ae16-0a52-4645-b5e0-254bc06f9294.png]

UGC videos that don't just look Good - They Sell 🍿

Hi,

Quick question - when's the last time an AI video actually held attention long
enough to drive a sale?

Most don't. The camera never moves, the delivery stays flat, and people scroll
before the hook even lands. No watch time, no clicks, no conversions.

We've been working on the fix. Here's an early look:











[https://pa.predis.ai/54757a92-e6e6-4ba2-bdeb-dedfc0934bbb.png]
https://youtube.com/shorts/5x19qNErio0?feature=share

[https://pa.pr
